Table 3: Temporal evolution training loss for different metrics.

Figure 1: CompNO model overview: The input consists of the initial function state Û t with the physical parameter vector γ. The Foundation Blocks are pretrained Neural Operators that independently predict the time-evolution corresponding to specific elementary operators. The Aggregator is a neural network that combines their embeddings. The prediction Û t+1 will be used as input for the next time step prediction. The training process incorporates data-driven loss as well as physics loss.
